query_shape: parent: SELECT entity FROM peer_rotation_flows GROUP BY entity; fund: fund_holdings_v2 + family_name COALESCE

notes: Parent path reads pre-aggregated peer_rotation_flows.entity column; rebuild needs tp_eid keying. Fund path uses family_name (no rollup pattern).

return_columns: buyers, sellers, new_entries, exits + flow_intensity charts
blocking_dependencies: investor_flows precompute keyed by inst_parent_name not tp_eid

notes: Live fallback (_compute_flows_live at L316) is CLEAN name-coalesce → top_parent_canonical_name_sql swap. Precomputed investor_flows read at L506+ blocked on rebuild.

query_shape: parent: COALESCE(rn inst_parent_name manager_name) AS investor; multi-quarter loop QoQ econ_retention
return_columns: summary stats + detail rows with manager_type
notes: Manager_type pulled via MAX(manager_type) on holdings_v2 column directly; no imputation needed. econ_retention loop iterates QUARTERS but separate executes per QoQ pair (not LAG/LEAD).

query_shape: SELECT inst_parent_name FROM investor_flows WHERE ticker AND quarter_from AND rollup_type
blocking_dependencies: investor_flows / shares_history precompute keyed by inst_parent_name not tp_eid
notes: Same precompute dependency as S2 inner read. Listed as separate site per CSV row but practically subsumed by S2.

query_shape: SELECT entity FROM peer_rotation_flows WHERE sector AND level AND rollup_type AND ticker IN (subject peer)
blocking_dependencies: compute_peer_rotation.py precompute keyed by entity-name not tp_eid
notes: CSV claims flows.py:600-625 — function actually lives in trend.py:649. CSV path drift flagged.

query_shape: parent: COALESCE(rn inst_parent_name manager_name) AS parent_name + MAX(rollup_eid_sql) AS rollup_eid
return_columns: top 25 parents with per-quarter shares + change_pct + N-PORT children
notes: Has rollup_eid passthrough used downstream for parent_fund_map JOIN. Migration: swap COALESCE name pattern to top_parent_canonical_name_sql; rollup_eid expression independent.

query_shape: parent: COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(rn inst_parent_name manager_name)) FROM holdings_v2 GROUP BY quarter
return_columns: per-quarter total_inst_shares total_inst_value holder_count active_value passive_value
notes: COALESCE inside COUNT DISTINCT. holdings_v2 unaliased — execute PR adds alias h and uses top_parent_canonical_name_sql alias variant per binder rule.

query_shape: RECURSIVE CTE entity_relationships → entity_identifiers cik → SUM(holdings_v2.market_value_usd) WHERE cik IN subtree
notes: Not a name-coalesce site. Uses CIK-set subquery filter on holdings_v2. Migration shape is `FROM holdings_v2 → FROM unified_holdings` (R5 view) — different class than top_parent_canonical_name_sql swap. Recon recommends own treatment.

query_shape: LEFT JOIN entity_current ec_rollup ON ec_rollup.entity_id = ec.rollup_entity_id (EC) or via erh (DM)
